purpose: Import, refactor, and unify real non-secret macro substrate inside Microcosm, with metadata and fixtures only as claim-bounded regression scaffolding around verified bodies.

proof body import only; not theorem-solution claim, hosted publication action, or raw macro-root mirror

omitted_material.reason: Only credential-bearing or account-bound bodies use this omission lane; real non-secret macro bodies use the direct import classification lane.
Operator conversation bodies and provider payload bodies stay out; non-secret macro code, proof, pattern, and receipt bodies do not use this omission lane.

steps.action: Select macro refs as import candidates, not as evidence-only substitutes.
Exclude credentials, operator conversation bodies, and provider payloads; import verified non-secret bodies; use replacement refs only when a body cannot stand alone.
Land fixture, standard, paper module, runtime, tests, receipts, and reusable body imports before marking accepted.
